seo.title: Raiden Shogun Build Guide — GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Raiden Shogun build guide for Genshin Impact v4.8. Best weapons ranked (Engulfing Lightning, The Catch), optimal artifacts (Emblem of Severed Fate), team compositions, and rotation guide.

intro: Raiden Shogun is one of Genshin's most versatile characters: team battery, sub-DPS, and enabler. This guide covers everything you need to build her optimally in v4.8.
weapon_bottom_line: Engulfing Lightning is BiS. The Catch R5 is 85% as good — and free. Only pull signature if you want to min-max.

weapons.name: Engulfing Lightning
weapons.notes: Signature. ATK based on ER above 100%.

weapons.name: The Catch R5
weapons.notes: Best F2P. +32% burst DMG, +12% CR. Free.

weapons.name: Staff of Homa
weapons.notes: Strong stat stick. HP convert to ATK.

artifact_why: Raiden's kit revolves around her burst and ER. Emblem converts ER investment into burst DMG. With 250% ER → 62.5% burst DMG bonus.
artifact_alt: 2pc Emblem + 2pc Thundering Fury (while farming). 4pc Emblem is the goal.

main_stats.sands_note: ER% if below 250%. ATK% if Engulfing + high ER subs.
main_stats.goblet_note: Electro generally better. ATK% goblet viable with Engulfing.

teams.name: Team 1: Raiden National
teams.desc: The classic. High single-target + AoE. Consistent rotations. Easy to play. Perfect for Abyss.

teams.name: Team 2: Raiden Hypercarry
teams.desc: Maximum personal damage. Kazuha VV shred + Sara/Bennett ATK buffs. Massive burst numbers. Needs C6 Sara.

teams.name: Team 3: Raiden Hyperbloom
teams.desc: Full EM build (Triple EM, Dragon's Bane). Triggers hyperblooms from off-field. Highest floor-damage team in the game.

rotation_code: Raiden E → Xingqiu E Q E → Bennett Q E → Xiangling Q E → Raiden Q → N3C × 4 → Repeat
rotation_key: ⚠️ Raiden's E first for coordinated attack. Bennett before Xiangling so she snapshots the ATK buff.
mistakes: ❌ Too little ER. Raiden needs 250%+. Below 220%, burst won't be up on cooldown.
❌ ATK% sands without enough ER. ER sands is almost always better.
❌ Not leveling skill. Her E buffs team burst DMG. Level it to at least 8.
❌ Wasting burst on low HP enemies. Initial slash does massive DMG — aim at biggest threat.
